zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Maunby於大約1194年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾茂比時，他的父親Roger Lascelles II36歲，母親Beatrice Wigton34歲。他與Avice Lascelles結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1239年1月20日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾吉可比。

zh-hans.Kirkby Wharfe, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉可比 華阿費
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Maunby于大约1194年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾茂比时，他的父亲Roger Lascelles II36岁，母亲Beatrice Wigton34岁。他与Avice Lascelles结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1239年1月20日之前在英国英格兰越可爾吉可比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maunby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Manni  .

variants.name: Manni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Domenic, Giacomo, Luigi, Primo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Manno  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Maunby was born about 1194, in Maunby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Lascelles II, was 36 and his mother, Beatrice Wigton, was 34. He married Avice Lascelles. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 20 January 1239, in Kirkby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Maunby est né environ 1194, à Maunby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Lascelles II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Wigton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Avice Lascelles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 20 janvier 1239, à Kirkby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Maunby um 1194 in Maunby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Lascelles II 36 und seine Mutter Beatrice Wigton 34. Er hat Avice Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 20. Januar 1239 in Kirkby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Maunby è nato il circa 1194 nel Maunby, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Lascelles II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Wigton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Avice Lascelles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 20 gennaio 1239, nel Kirkby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Maunbyが約1194年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアマウンビーで生まれた時，父Roger Lascelles IIは36歳，母Beatrice Wigtonは34歳であった。Avice Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1239年1月20日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Maunby(이)가 대략 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 모비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lascelles II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Wigton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Avice Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1239년 1월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커크비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Maunby nasceu aproximadamente 1194, em Maunby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Lascelles II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Wigton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice Lascelles. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 20 de janeiro de 1239, em Kirkby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Maunby родился около 1194 г. в местности маунби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Lascelles II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Wigton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice Lascelles. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 20 январь 1239 г. в местности киркби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Avice Lascelles. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 20 de enero de 1239, en Kirkby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
